title: conyza sumatrensis
intro: Conyza sumatrensis, also known as Sumatran fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Conyza sumatrensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
